sections.summary: Aspiring Computer Science and Engineering student with a strong interest in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Web Development.
sections.education: B.Tech 2nd Year-Computer Science & Engineering(AIML) Woxsen University,Telangana 2024 – 2028 CGPA:7.59, SGPA:8.41
sections.skills: Programming Languages: Java, Python Web Technologies: HTML, CSS Databases: MySQL (Basic) Machine Learning: Scikit-learn (Basics), Data Preprocessing, Model Evaluation Core Concepts: Object-Oriented Programming, Data Structures (Basic) Tools: Git, VS Code, Jupyter Notebook

projects.title: SOT Student Grievance Management System
projects.description: SOT Student Grievance Management System Developed a web-based grievance management system to manage and resolve student complaints. Implemented modules for login/registration, grievance submission, tracking, and admin dashboard with role-based access control. Built analytics dashboards to analyze complaint trends using HTML, CSS, PHP, MySQL, and XAMPP.

projects.title: Authenticity Analysis of Real and AI-Generated Images Using Deep Learning
projects.description: Authenticity Analysis of Real and AI-Generated Images Using Deep Learning Developed a deep learning system to detect whether images are real or AI-generated using CNN and transfer learning. Trained the model on the CIFAKE dataset and evaluated performance using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and confusion matrix. Built a web interface for real-time image verification, achieving 97.67% classification accuracy.

projects.title: Disease Diagnosis using Machine Learning
projects.description: Disease Diagnosis using Machine Learning Built a machine learning model using Python and Scikit-learn to predict diabetes using the PIMA Indian Diabetes Dataset. Performed data preprocessing and feature selection and implemented a Random Forest classifier, achieving ~74% prediction accuracy.

projects.title: Campus Shuttle Routing & Capacity Scheduling
projects.description: Campus Shuttle Routing & Capacity Scheduling Disease Diagnosis using Machine Learning Built a machine learning model using Python and Scikit-learn to predict diabetes using the PIMA Indian Diabetes Dataset. Performed data preprocessing and feature selection and implemented a Random Forest classifier, achieving ~74% prediction accuracy. Designed an optimized campus transportation routing system using graph-based modeling and the Greedy Nearest Neighbor algorithm. Improved route planning efficiency while considering bus capacity and scheduling constraints.

projects.title: Social Event Management Web Application
projects.description: Social Event Management Web Application Developed a web-based platform connecting customers with event service providers. Implemented service search, booking, rating, and location-based recommendations with a database to manage users, services, bookings, and feedback.

sections.experience: Collaborated in team-based academic projects, contributing to planning, development, and implementation. Presented research findings and project outcomes in internal evaluations. Applied classroom concepts to real-world problems through practical projects.
